title: Starting a Yoga Routine to Manage Stress

all.en: For months, my shoulders had been tight from sitting at the computer all day.
all.zh: 好幾個月來，我整天坐在電腦前，肩膀一直很緊繃。

all.en: A coworker recommended a beginner yoga class held in a quiet studio downtown.
all.zh: 一位同事推薦了一間市區安靜的瑜伽教室，那裡有初學者課程。

all.en: On my first visit, the instructor asked me to leave my phone in a locker.
all.zh: 第一次去的時候，老師要我把手機放進置物櫃裡。

all.en: The studio smelled like lavender, and soft music played in the background.
all.zh: 教室裡瀰漫著薰衣草香，背景輕輕播放著柔和的音樂。

all.en: We started with deep breathing exercises to calm the mind before stretching.
all.zh: 我們先做深呼吸練習，讓心靜下來，再開始伸展。

all.en: Some poses looked simple, but holding them for a minute was harder than I expected.
all.zh: 有些動作看起來簡單，但要維持一分鐘比我想像中困難得多。

all.en: The teacher reminded us to listen to our bodies and never push too hard.
all.zh: 老師提醒我們要傾聽自己的身體，絕對不要過度勉強。

all.en: By the time we finished, my mind felt clear and my body felt much lighter.
all.zh: 課程結束時，我的腦袋變得清晰，身體也感覺輕盈許多。

all.en: I noticed that I slept much better that night without tossing and turning.
all.zh: 我發現那晚睡得特別好，不再翻來覆去。

all.en: After three weeks of practice, I could finally touch my toes without bending my knees.
all.zh: 練習三週後，我終於可以不彎膝蓋摸到腳趾了。

all.en: Yoga slowly became my favorite way to deal with work pressure.
all.zh: 瑜伽漸漸成為我處理工作壓力最喜歡的方式。

all.en: Now I attend two classes every week and recommend it to all my stressed friends.
all.zh: 現在我每週上兩堂課，也推薦給所有壓力大的朋友。
